texto: Yes, we've seen it all before. And yes, those who do not study history are condemned to repeat it. But no, the sky is not falling - baseball is such a great game that neither the owners nor the players can kill it. After some necessary carnage, market forces will prevail.
explicacao: Citação de John Thorn sobre temas ligados a educacao. “Yes, we've seen it all before. And yes, those who do not study history are condemned to repeat it…” articula educacao, great, baseball em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e baseball.

texto: For many in baseball September is a month of stark contrast with April, when everyone had dared to hope. If baseball is a lot like life, as pundits declare, it is because life is more about losing than winning.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John Thorn: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. texto: More fundamentally, it is a dream that does not die with the onset of manhood: the dream is to play endlessly, past the time when you are called home for dinner, past the time of doing chores, past the time when your body betrays you past time itself.
